title: rosa × dumetorum var. incerta
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. incerta, also known as Rosa × dumetorum, is a hybrid rose species that is believed to be a cross between Rosa dumetorum and an unknown parent, although its exact parentage is still uncertain. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. incerta include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating pain, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Rosa × dumetorum var. incerta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to relieve headaches, reduce menstrual cramps, and soothe digestive issues.
